You have crossed into Ithilien and seek Faramir's Rangers at Bâr Húrin.
Duilin is at the camp of Faramir's Rangers, at Bâr Húrin in South Ithilien. Duilin of the Blackroot Vale has called your name and beckoned you to spea…
